titleStmt.title: SII 30.270: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 270. (A.R. No. 622 of 1915.) Aṉṉiyūr, Villupuram Taluk, South Arcot District. Rāmanāthēśvara Temple-south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of Tripurasundari shrine Vīrapratāpa Sadāsivadēva-mahārāya: Śaka 1482: 1560 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records that six (paṇam) for an year per loom owned by the Kaikkōḷa mudalis and [four?] paṇam from the new settlers were collected as tax. This amount was gifted most probably to the temple for the merit of his Son-in-law Aḻiya Rāmurājayya, son of the Mahāmaṇḍalēsvara Sriraṅgarajāyyadēva-Mahārāja by Visvanātha Nāyakkar, son of Nāgama Nāyakkar of the Madurai Nāyak dynasty.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalecura śrīvīrapiṟatāpa catācivateva makāṟāyar piṟitiviṟācciyam paṇṇiaruḷā niṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 8 10 2 yitaṉmel
makāmaṇṭalecura śrīraṅkaṟājyateva makāṟācaiyyaṉ kumārar Aḷiya ṟāmu ṟācaiyyaṉukku puṇṇiyamāka nākamanāyakkar kumārar vicuvanāta nāyakkar
kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭum puvitarākattil Uḷpaṭṭa kāṇiyāṭci kaiykkoḷa mutaliyaḷukku taṟi Oṉṟukku varuṣam 1 6m vanteṟu kuṭiyaḷukku Orumā4
Inta taṉmattukku yātoruvar Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile pokakaṭavāṟākavum ..
Digital edition of SII 30.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
